mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID FROM USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT USER_ID , USER_NAME , USER_ROLE FROM USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND USER_PW = #{userPw}
SELECT USER_ID , USER_PW , USER_NAME , USER_ROLE FROM USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT U.USER_ID , U.USER_NAME , U.USER_TEL , U.USER_EMAIL , U.USER_ROLE , U.CREATE_DATE , CASE WHEN A.APPL_NUM IS NOT NULL THEN '이용 중' ELSE '-' END AS SERVICE_USE FROM USERS U LEFT JOIN APPLICATION A ON U.USER_ID = A.USER_ID ORDER BY U.CREATE_DATE DESC

SELECT U.USER_ID , U.USER_NAME , U.USER_TEL , U.USER_EMAIL , U.USER_ROLE , U.CREATE_DATE , CASE WHEN A.APPL_NUM IS NOT NULL THEN '이용 중' ELSE '-' END AS SERVICE_USE FROM USERS U LEFT JOIN APPLICATION A ON U.USER_ID = A.USER_ID WHERE U.USER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userName}, '%') ORDER BY U.CREATE_DATE DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) AS RECENT_SIGNUP_COUNT FROM USERS WHERE USER_ROLE = 'USER' AND CREATE_DATE >= NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAY
SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_USERS FROM USERS WHERE USER_ROLE = 'USER'
SELECT USER_ID , USER_EMAIL , USER_NAME , USER_TEL FROM USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT u.USER_ID , i.ATTACHED_IMG_NAME FROM USERS u LEFT OUTER JOIN user_img i ON u.USER_ID = i.USER_ID WHERE u.USER_ID = #{userId}
